description:
An unofficial, FLOSS, native Android NetBird client built with privacy in mind JetBird is a wrapper around the NetBird client and is privacy friendly, containing no blobs or trackers. Features
  • Native UI
  • Supports SSO and setup keys
  • Supports pre-shared keys
  • Real-time logs
  • Quick tile
  • Exclude apps from the tunnel
  • Exit nodes (with select and client-side customisation)
  • Android TV support
  • Lazy connection support
  • Profiles
